targets.rawSql: SELECT mr.ts AS time, d->>'bssid' AS bssid, d->>'ssid' AS ssid, d->>'grade' AS grade, d->>'encryption' AS encryption, d->>'pmf' AS pmf, d->>'wps_enabled' AS wps, mr.summary AS details FROM module_results mr, jsonb_array_elements(artifacts::jsonb->0->'data') AS d WHERE mr.module_name = 'wifi.security_assessor' AND $__timeFilter(mr.ts) ORDER BY mr.ts DESC;

SELECT time_bucket('30 seconds', ts) AS time, COALESCE(fields->>'ssid', '<broadcast>') AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'probe_request' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT d.key AS mac, d.value->>'device_type' AS device_type, d.value->>'os_family' AS os_family, (d.value->>'probe_count')::int AS probe_count, d.value->>'grouped_macs' AS grouped_macs FROM module_results mr, jsonb_each(mr.artifacts::jsonb->0->'data') AS d WHERE mr.module_name = 'wifi.probe_fingerprinter' AND mr.status = 'ok' ORDER BY probe_count DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time, src AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'subtype' = '12' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT channel::text AS channel, COUNT(*) AS frame_count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND channel IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY channel ORDER BY channel;
SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', ts) AS time, rssi_dbm AS value FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND rssi_dbm IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(fields->>'encryption', 'OPEN') AS encryption_type, COUNT(DISTINCT src) AS ap_count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'beacon' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY fields->>'encryption' ORDER BY ap_count DESC;

SELECT src AS mac, COUNT(*) AS frame_count, COUNT(DISTINCT dst) AS unique_destinations, MIN(ts) AS first_seen, MAX(ts) AS last_seen FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY src ORDER BY frame_count DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT fields->>'ssid' AS ssid, COUNT(DISTINCT src) AS bssid_count, ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT src) AS bssids, ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT channel::text) AS channels FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'ssid' IS NOT NULL AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'beacon' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY fields->>'ssid' HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT src) > 1 ORDER BY bssid_count DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT src AS bssid, fields->>'ssid' AS ssid, channel, rssi_dbm AS rssi, fields->>'encryption' AS encryption, MAX(ts) AS last_seen FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'beacon' AND (fields->>'wps_enabled' = 'true' OR fields->>'wps' IS NOT NULL) AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY src, fields->>'ssid', channel, rssi_dbm, fields->>'encryption' ORDER BY last_seen DESC;
